channel.title: nato on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in nato on IT notes

item.title: NATO phonetic alphabet
item.description: Symbol Code word Pronunciation A Alfa Al fah B Bravo Brah Voh C Charlie Char Lee D Delta Dell Tah E Echo Eck Oh F Fox Foks Trot G Golf Golf H Hotel Hoh Tell I India In Dee Ah J Juliett Jew Lee Ett K Kilo Key Loh L Lima Lee Mah M Mike Mike N November No Vem Ber O Oscar Oss Car P Papa Pah Pah Q Quebec Keh Beck R Romeo Row Me Oh S Sierra See Air Ah T Tango Tang Go U Uniform You Nee Form V Victor Vik Tah W Whiskey Wiss Key X X-ray Ecks Ray Y Yankee Yang Key Z Zulu Zoo Loo 0 Zero Zee Row 1 One Wun 2 Two Too 3 Three Tree 4 Four Fow Er 5 Five Fife 6 Six Six 7 Seven Sev En 8 Eight Ait 9 Nine Nine Er
